channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Exploring Urrak Production at South Goa Cashew Plantations
item.description: During the months of April and May, the small Goan communities in Quepem and Canacona witness a unique local tradition centred around urrak, the lightly spiked precursor to Feni. The drink, which is m...

item.title: Comedian Njugush Revamps Matatu Tugi Following Separation from Wife Celestine Ndinda
item.description: Popular Kenyan comedian Njugush, whose real name is Timothy Kimani, has given his matatu named Tugi a major facelift. This comes shortly after he and his wife Celestine Ndinda confirmed their mutual s...

item.title: Tanzania Ready to Host Regional Oil Refinery in Tanga for East Africa Energy Security
item.description: Tanzania has shown full readiness to host a big regional oil refinery plant in Tanga region. This important project will help improve fuel supply across East Africa, increase energy security and suppo...

item.title: Iran presents peace proposal to the U.S., but Trump remains dissatisfied
item.description: In a move to ease tensions, Iran has presented a new peace proposal to the United States via Pakistan, despite the ongoing ceasefire between the two countries. This comes after weeks of frozen negotia...

item.title: PMD issues nationwide alert for storms, heavy rainfall, and possible landslides from May 2
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has issued a comprehensive weather advisory warning of widespread dust-thunderstorms, heavy rains, hailstorms, and strong winds affecting multiple regions ...

item.title: Albanese Government Rules Out Indexing Income Tax Rates Ahead of May Budget
item.description: Ahead of the May 12 federal budget, Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has indicated his government will not be implementing the indexing of income tax brackets, a reform many economists say could preven...

item.title: US plans phased withdrawal of 5,000 troops from Germany amid tensions with European allies
item.description: The United States has announced plans to withdraw 5,000 troops from Germany over the next six to twelve months, a move that reflects growing tensions between Washington and its European allies, partic...

item.title: Ruto’s Planned Address to Tanzania Parliament Signals Stronger Regional Cooperation
item.description: The upcoming address by Kenya’s President William Ruto to Tanzania’s Parliament on 5 May 2026 is being seen as a major diplomatic and economic step between the two East African nations. The article hi...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif forms high-level committee to resolve One Constitution Avenue dispute in Islamabad
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has taken a significant step regarding the ongoing dispute over the One Constitution Avenue building in Islamabad. On Friday, he constituted a high-level committee chaire...

item.title: Legal experts say lawsuits against OpenAI over Tumbler Ridge shooting face significant hurdles
item.description: Families of victims of the Tumbler Ridge, British Columbia school shooting have filed lawsuits against OpenAI, alleging the company failed to alert authorities about warning signs in the shooter’s int...

item.title: Three Kent teenagers jailed for manslaughter after luring and fatally attacking 49-year-old man on Isle of Sheppey beach
item.description: A 49-year-old man named Alexander Cashford was killed on the Isle of Sheppey in Kent after being lured to a beach by three teenagers who posed as a teenage girl online. The group, consisting of two bo...

item.title: Winnie and Ida Odinga Grace Catherine Jepchumba’s Private Wedding in Style
item.description: On Friday, May 1, 2026, Winnie Odinga and her mother, Ida Odinga, attended the wedding of Catherine Jepchumba, daughter of Nairobi Securities Exchange chairman Kiprono Kittony, who married her Nigeria...

item.title: De Zerbi brings renewed belief at Tottenham amid relegation struggle
item.description: Tottenham Hotspur goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky has credited new head coach Roberto De Zerbi with restoring belief and positivity within the squad as the club fights to stay in the Premier League. De Zerb...

item.title: PM Shehbaz orders swift implementation of Pakistan’s virtual assets regulatory framework
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has directed relevant authorities to make Pakistan’s virtual assets regulatory framework fully operational as soon as possible in an effort to strengthen the country’s di...

item.title: Completed East West Rail line between Oxford and Milton Keynes faces ongoing delays to passenger services
item.description: The East West Rail project linking Oxford and Milton Keynes, a key component of a broader plan to connect Oxford and Cambridge, has been completed since 2024 but remains without passenger services. De...

item.title: Tanzania Plans Wildlife Park Training Facilities for AFCON 2027 Teams
item.description: Tanzania is putting strong plans in place to make the 2027 Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) a unique and memorable tournament by combining football with tourism. The Prime Minister, Dr Mwigulu Nchemba, c...

item.title: NASA Achieves Record 120 kW in Lithium-Fed Magnetoplasmadynamic Thruster Test for Future Mars Missions
item.description: NASA engineers at the Jet Propulsion Laboratory have successfully tested a next-generation lithium-fed magnetoplasmadynamic (MPD) thruster, reaching a new U.S. record of 120 kilowatts of power. This a...

item.title: Filipino transport advocacy group gains global recognition for promoting safer, people-centered urban mobility
item.description: The article reports on the international recognition received by the Move As One Coalition, a Filipino active transport advocacy group, after winning the grand prize at the 2025–2026 World Resources I...

item.title: U.S. to withdraw 5,000 troops from Germany amid tensions with allies over Iran conflict
item.description: The United States has ordered the withdrawal of approximately 5,000 troops from Germany, marking a significant shift in its military posture in Europe. The decision, confirmed by Pentagon spokesperson...

item.title: Corberán weighs two-striker option as Valencia prepare for crucial Atletico Madrid clash
item.description: Valencia manager Carlos Corberán don hint say he fit use two strikers, Umar Sadiq and Hugo Duro, for their important La Liga match against Atletico Madrid. The decision dey come at a very critical tim...
